creator: need4spam@bk.ru
text:
There is almost no documentation on ECMP(RADIX_MPATH) in FreeBSD and
new options added to route command in this commit:

http://www.mail-archive.com/svn-src-all@freebsd.org/msg07687.html

Fix: 

Update man page or create handbook's page dedicated to ECMP
How-To-Repeat: man route
